description: KEYWORD TEST: wrtn and blackbox — both confirmed page-loading in #360. Submit SSN keyword prompt to verify APF blocking.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads (confirmed #358/#360). Find chat input, type and submit prompt. APF should block (SSN regex \d{6}-\d{7}). Report what user sees after submission.
services.notes: wrtn uses openai_compat_sse. Previous tests showed hold/release clean for page-load POSTs. Need actual chat prompt with SSN keyword.

services.expected: Page loads (confirmed #360, recovered from ERR_H2). Find chat input, type and submit prompt. APF should block (SSN regex). Report what user sees.
services.notes: blackbox uses blackbox_json response type. Was BLANK_PAGE in #353 but recovered. First keyword test for this service.

notes: CONTEXT: #360 confirmed both services load pages normally. wrtn had 3x hold/release (all clean, page-load POSTs). blackbox loaded on both www.blackbox.ai and app.blackbox.ai. This test focuses ONLY on keyword blocking — submit SSN prompt and observe APF response.
